---
title: 'Recovery'
date: '2013-12-30T13:47:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1692749580614796747'
blogger_filename: '/2013/12/recovery.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Life Events'
---

<br />
<h1 class="Title TitleSmall" style="background-color: white; color: #9d3300; font-family: arial; font-size: 24px; font-weight: normal; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; width: 525px;">
<a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/ephesians/5-28.html" target="_blank">Ephesians 5:28 (New International Version)</a></h1>
<span class="versenum" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 20px; margin: 0px 3px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">28</span><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;In this same way, husbands ought to love their wives</span><a href="" name="1" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;"></a><span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;">&nbsp;as their own bodies. He who loves his wife loves himself.</span><br />
<span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;"><br /></span>
<span style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: arial; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px;">Sunday 12/29 marks the start of a new marriage for me. Not with a new woman, but a re-boot if you will. We aired things that were ten years coming. We're seeking out counsel. We're on the road to recovery.&nbsp;</span>
